name: ICIL Auto-Router Eval Set
description: Labeled evaluation prompts for measuring ICIL auto-router accuracy. 200 prompts across 29 faculties, 3 difficulty tiers, EN+ID bilingual coverage, and edge-case testing.

prompts.prompt: How do I choose the right color palette for my SaaS dashboard?
prompts.notes: Direct color palette — HIGH tier warna

prompts.prompt: What's the psychology behind why users click red buttons more?
Bikinin palet warna yang cocok buat brand fashion mewah
prompts.notes: BI: palet warna + mewah = harmony + psychology + palette

prompts.prompt: My dark mode contrast ratio fails WCAG — how do I fix it?
What's the difference between OKLCH and HSL color spaces?
prompts.notes: Color model query — OKLCH + HSL match MEDIUM

prompts.prompt: How do color meanings differ between Western and Asian cultures?
prompts.notes: Cultural color — should match via LOW tier

prompts.prompt: How does anchoring bias affect pricing page design?
prompts.notes: Direct cognitive bias — anchoring is HIGH tier

prompts.prompt: Implement Fitts' Law — my buttons are too small and far apart
prompts.notes: Direct UX law — Fitts' Law is HIGH tier

prompts.prompt: Is gamification with streaks and badges ethical for a fitness app?
How do I apply the Hook Model to increase daily active users?
prompts.notes: Direct behavioral design — Hook Model HIGH tier

prompts.prompt: Are confirm-shaming popups considered dark patterns?
prompts.notes: Dark pattern query — confirm-shaming is a known DP

prompts.prompt: Users keep missing the submit button — is this Gestalt proximity?
prompts.notes: Gestalt principle — proximity is MEDIUM tier

Automate our test suite in GitHub Actions — run on every PR

Design an SDK that feels native in Python, JavaScript, and Go

How does AI personalization change information architecture patterns?

Coordinate 5 specialized agents — one plans, one codes, one reviews, one tests

gimana cara bikin website yang accessible buat semua orang?
tipografi yang enak dibaca buat aplikasi mobile itu kayak gimana?
prompts.notes: BI: readability + spacing + scale for mobile

prompts.prompt: layout yang responsive itu pake grid atau flexbox sih?
gimana cara ngurangin bounce rate di landing page?
prompts.notes: BI: bounce rate = UX psychology + improvement

prompts.prompt: How do I improve color contrast while keeping the brand's aesthetic?
Our server is slow under load — is it a code problem, database problem, or infra?
prompts.notes: Triple-faculty: perf + DB + engineering — system-wide perf

prompts.prompt: I want to practice good design but I'm not sure what that means
prompts.notes: Ambiguous query — should still find improvement + possibly strategic-design

prompts.prompt: Nulis kalimat di tombol 'Kirim' atau 'Submit' ya yang bener?
How do I make my service reliable and resilient when downstream APIs fail?
What's the best practice for color in western corporate design?
prompts.notes: Warna suara NEGATIVE keyword test — NOT warna. But 'color western' should match warna/04

prompts.prompt: Analyze user session recordings — what patterns indicate frustration?
Design a conversational AI agent that handles multi-turn dialogue with memory
prompts.notes: Triple-faculty: conv UI + AI integration + AI agents

prompts.prompt: The voice and tone of our brand should be warm and professional
prompts.notes: Voice and tone = UX writing HIGH. But 'brand' also triggers branding. warna suara NEGATIVE should NOT block this since it's 'voice and tone' not 'warna suara'.

prompts.prompt: gimana cara deploy aplikasi nodejs supaya bisa diakses banyak orang?
How do we secure our supply chain — audit npm dependencies for vulnerabilities?
Build a real-time collaborative whiteboard — what tech stack and architecture?
prompts.notes: Architecture decision + DB choice for real-time

prompts.prompt: Set up database replication for read-heavy workloads with read replicas
Write a system prompt for an AI that acts as a senior code reviewer
Our design tokens are inconsistent across web and mobile — how to fix?
How does human perception of motion affect animation timing in UI?
prompts.notes: Motion perception = animasi + cognitive science overlap

prompts.prompt: Create an onboarding flow that teaches users without annoying them
prompts.notes: Triple-faculty: onboarding copy + mobile patterns + form/pattern design

prompts.prompt: How do I know if our product is actually solving the right problem?
Coba jelasin gimana cara bikin sistem yang scalable, secure, dan maintainable
prompts.notes: BI: broad system design — architecture + security + cloud deployment
